clips.title: The Observer
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, contemplative grade. A rooftop observatory at night, a large telescope, star charts, soft instrument glow. Night, quiet. A person in a warm cardigan leans to the telescope eyepiece, then looks up with wonder. The camera stays locked in place and zooms in with the lens, magnifying tight onto their awed face. Cool starlight, warm instrument glow, 85mm zoom, lens zoom in. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Watcher
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A hillside overlook at dawn, tall grass, a valley below in mist. Early morning, cool. A person in a field jacket raises binoculars, scanning the distance intently. The camera stays locked in place and zooms in with the lens, magnifying tight onto their focused expression. Cool dawn light, soft mist, 85mm zoom, lens zoom in. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Letter
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, emotional grade. A quiet study by a rain-streaked window, a desk, a single lamp. Afternoon, grey light. A person in a sweater reads a handwritten letter, their expression shifting to shock. The camera stays locked in place and zooms in with the lens, magnifying tight onto their stunned face. Soft grey window light, warm lamp, 85mm zoom, lens zoom in. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Tell
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, rich casino grade. A dim poker room, green felt, chips, cigar smoke drifting. Night, tense. A person in a sharp blazer holds their cards, eyes flicking up. The camera stays locked in place and zooms in with the lens, magnifying tight onto their eyes for the tell. Warm pool light, deep shadow, 85mm zoom, lens zoom in. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Discovery
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, clinical grade. A modern lab bench, a microscope, glassware, cool overhead light. Day. A person in a lab coat looks up sharply from the microscope, eyes wide with realization. The camera stays locked in place and zooms in with the lens, magnifying tight onto their astonished face. Cool lab light, clean tones, 85mm zoom, lens zoom in. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Across the Room
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm grade. A crowded elegant gala, chandeliers, guests mingling, soft bokeh. Evening, warm. A person in formal attire stands still amid the crowd, catching sight of someone, expression softening. The camera stays locked in place and zooms in with the lens, magnifying tight onto their face as the crowd blurs. Warm gala light, rich bokeh, 85mm zoom, lens zoom in. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
